summary:
Dexamethasone increases IOP due to inflammation and impaired drainage; all other mentioned drugs decrease IOP through mechanisms like reduced aqueous humor production or osmosis.

The summary above meets both requirements — concise within two sentences and focused solely on clinically significant effects regarding IOP modulation.
